description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master, pull requests, and workflow dispatch. The workflow has three jobs: unix-like, linux_lint, and windows. The unix-like job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-20.04 and macos-10.15 with various configurations, installing Java, Python, and Go, and running tests and benchmarks. The linux_lint job runs on ubuntu-20.04, installing Python, GCC, and clang-tidy, and linting code. The windows job runs on a matrix of windows-2019 and windows-2016 with various configurations, installing Java, Python, and Go, and running tests and benchmarks.
